---
title: "Assignment #2"
author: "Jiaqi Ma"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    code_folding: hide  
    theme: journal
    fig.caption: true
    toc: true                  
    toc_depth: 3                
    toc_float: true
bibliography: BCB420.bib
link-citations: true
nocite: '@*'
---

```{=html}
<style>
body {
  font-size: 16px;
}

caption {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-style: italic;
}
</style>
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
                      warning = FALSE, # suppressing warning messages
                      message = FALSE,
                      knitr.kable.max_rows = 5)
```

# Introduction to Assignment #1

...

## Import Assignment #1 result

...

# Thresholded over-representation analysis

...

## Choice of Method

...

## Annotation resource and verion

...

## result

...

## Interpretation

...

# Non-thresholded Gene set Enrichment analysis

...

## Choice of Method

...

## Annotation resource and verion

...

## result

...

## Interpretation

...

# Cytoscape Visualization

...

# Interpretation

...

# References {#references}
